calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-033b OFC-analog oracle landing (UC6 round-trip)
items.notes: 6-sub-test landing diagnostic extending V3-EXQ-485. UC1-UC5 carried over (instantiation, gate modulates update, bias zero at init, backward compat, reset clears state_code). UC6 NEW: oracle round-trip -- (A) query_outcome() output bit-identical to e2_harm_s.forward() (max diff < 1e-6); (B) AssertionError when oracle disabled; (C) reset() clears _last_outcome_prediction + _ofc_oracle_predictions; (D) oracle_is_ready=False by default; (E) get_state() exposes oracle_enabled=True and last_oracle_pred_norm > 0 after a query. Validates MECH-263 specific-outcome oracle path (OFCConfig.use_outcome_oracle). Pure deterministic arithmetic; no env steps.

items.title: SD-049 Phase 2 hybrid encoder behavioural validation
items.notes: 4-arm sweep ARM_0/ARM_1/ARM_2/ARM_3 with phased training (P0 joint trunk + classifier + prox -> P1 freeze classifier head -> P2 evaluate). 10 acceptance criteria: C0 ARM_0 baseline replicates V3-EXQ-322a 0.06 floor; C1a/b ARM_1 obs_dim 325 + classifier trains; C2a-e ARM_2 obs_dim 325 + goal_resource_r >= 0.5 (target lift from 0.066 baseline) + lift over ARM_0 >= 0.2 + identity-recovery linear-probe accuracy > 0.6 + per-axis drive evolves; C3a/b ARM_3 obs_dim 375 + classifier did fire (no crash on 5-type). PASS = SD-049 Phase 2 validated; SD-015 promotable; SD-049 v3_pending may be cleared. FAIL routes to verdict.md 6-row interpretation grid; row 6 is the Woo/Spelke-style substrate-ceiling falsifier. Lit-pull provenance in evidence/literature/targeted_review_sd_049_encoder_identity_expansion/verdict.md (Option C hybrid, confidence 0.78).
